title: 🏷️ VIDEO
data_structure:
```typescript
[
    {
        name: 'video_provider',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'youtube',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'videoProvider'],
    },
    {
        name: 'external_id',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'NqsBncRslsg',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'title',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'P1 vs F40',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'description',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'Drag Race - P1 vs F40',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'creator',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'Lovecars',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'license',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'youtube',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'tags',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'F40, P1',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'source',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NqsBncRslsg',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'duration',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'PT7M24S',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'thumbnail_url_l',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/maxresdefault.jpg',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'thumbnail_url_m',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/sddefault.jpg',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'thumbnail_url_s',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/mqdefault.jpg',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'thumbnail_url_xs',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/default.jpg',
        scope: 'system',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
]
```
